body:
APPROVE
The escalation walks the cheap → standard → smart ladder only on filter-empty errors, correctly skipping hard pin conflicts via shouldEscalateOnError. Error type is properly mirrored at both internal (routing.ErrNoLiveProvider) and public (ErrNoLiveProvider) layers with errors.As support, and the test exercises both success and exhaustion paths against real config + cooldown bookkeeping.
